##  About
**Amonak is a social network dedicated to e-commerce**
Its purpose is to enable individuals and companies to exchange, promote and sell their products and services around the world directly on the platform **Amonak.**
**How the Amonak platform works**
There are three types of publications :
The**POSTS** , which are free content;
The**SALES** , which allow to sell throughout the world without counting the distance;
The**ALERTS** , which gives the possibility to make public an urgent or rare need.
Finally Amonak being a social network has instant messaging functionalities, stories and users can connect freely.
